brooks_law_warning: Brooks's Law: crashing by adding people to a late task makes it later (ramp-up plus communication overhead). Prefer fast-tracking discretionary dependencies; treat added-resource re-estimates as suspect.
notification_draft:
SUBJECT: Schedule impact: website-relaunch finish moves 2026-08-28 -> 2026-09-01 (+4 days)
Trigger: confirmed slip on task 'frontend' (+4 days; cause: Design-system upgrade broke the template build; rework required)
Impact: forecast project finish moves from 2026-08-28 to 2026-09-01 (+4 calendar days).
Milestone breach: 'launch' (contractual) deadline 2026-08-28, new forecast 2026-09-01 (+4 days).
Options for the approval gate:
  1. COMPRESS - candidates on the new critical path: frontend, qa, design
     Brooks's Law: crashing by adding people to a late task makes it later (ramp-up plus communication overhead). Prefer fast-tracking discretionary dependencies; treat added-resource re-estimates as suspect.
  2. REBASELINE - requires change-control approval at a human gate; the old baseline stays in git history
  3. DESCOPE or renegotiate the breached milestone(s)
No plan changes have been applied. This replan is held for human approval.
